assertions.description: All 19 footprints parsed with correct pad-net assignments. Routing complete (18/18 nets routed, 7 vias). Courtyard overlap (J1 vs U7, 10.3 mm²) and U7 edge clearance violation (-0.46mm, outside board edge) correctly detected. DFM tier standard with 0.25mm trace width. Board dimensions 62.23×30.48mm correct.
assertions.aspirational_reason: auto-generated check path incorrect for PCB/gerber output
